contract.summary: navigation 公共交通 Taxi* 静态边

joins: taxinodes（起点 / 终点节点名称与地图信息）
taxipathnode（用于过滤公共交通候选路径）
uimapassignment（把 MapID 保守映射到 UiMapID）
select: nodes dataset：taxi_node_id, ui_map_id, map_id, node_name, node_flags, condition_id, visibility_condition_id
edges dataset：edge_index, path_id, from_node_id, to_node_id, edge_cost, edge_label, mode, has_delay_node, has_stop_node, has_map_change_node
where: 只保留至少存在一个 Delay > 0 或 stop flag 节点的 TaxiPath，作为飞艇 / 船 / 电车等公共交通候选
不把普通飞行点路径直接并入当前推荐逻辑
query.row_granularity: nodes 一行代表一个 Taxi 节点；edges 一行代表一条公共交通候选路径

nodes.sql:
WITH public_path_ids AS (
  SELECT CAST(PathID AS INTEGER) AS path_id
  FROM taxipathnode
  WHERE TRIM(COALESCE(PathID, '')) <> ''
    AND CAST(PathID AS INTEGER) > 0
    AND (
      CAST(COALESCE(Delay, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0
      OR (CAST(COALESCE(Flags, 0) AS INTEGER) & 2) <> 0
    )
  GROUP BY CAST(PathID AS INTEGER)
), public_paths AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(tp.ID AS INTEGER) AS path_id,
    CAST(tp.FromTaxiNode AS INTEGER) AS from_taxi_node_id,
    CAST(tp.ToTaxiNode AS INTEGER) AS to_taxi_node_id,
    CAST(COALESCE(tp.Cost, 0) AS INTEGER) AS path_cost
  FROM taxipath tp
  JOIN public_path_ids ppi ON ppi.path_id = CAST(tp.ID AS INTEGER)
  WHERE TRIM(COALESCE(tp.ID, '')) <> ''
    AND TRIM(COALESCE(tp.FromTaxiNode, '')) <> ''
    AND TRIM(COALESCE(tp.ToTaxiNode, '')) <> ''
    AND CAST(tp.ID AS INTEGER) > 0
    AND CAST(tp.FromTaxiNode AS INTEGER) > 0
    AND CAST(tp.ToTaxiNode AS INTEGER) > 0
), used_nodes AS (
  SELECT from_taxi_node_id AS taxi_node_id FROM public_paths
  UNION
  SELECT to_taxi_node_id AS taxi_node_id FROM public_paths
)
SELECT
  'taxi_' || CAST(tn.ID AS TEXT) AS taxi_node_key,
  CAST(tn.ID AS INTEGER) AS taxi_node_id,
  CAST(COALESCE((
    SELECT MIN(CAST(uma.UiMapID AS INTEGER))
    FROM uimapassignment uma
    WHERE CAST(uma.MapID AS INTEGER) = CAST(tn.ContinentID AS INTEGER)
      AND CAST(COALESCE(uma.UiMapID, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0
  ), 0) AS INTEGER) AS ui_map_id,
  CAST(COALESCE(tn.ContinentID, 0) AS INTEGER) AS map_id,
  Name_lang AS node_name,
  CAST(COALESCE(tn.Flags, 0) AS INTEGER) AS node_flags,
  CAST(COALESCE(tn.ConditionID, 0) AS INTEGER) AS condition_id,
  CAST(COALESCE(tn.VisibilityConditionID, 0) AS INTEGER) AS visibility_condition_id
FROM taxinodes tn
JOIN used_nodes un ON un.taxi_node_id = CAST(tn.ID AS INTEGER)
WHERE TRIM(COALESCE(tn.ID, '')) <> ''
  AND CAST(tn.ID AS INTEGER) > 0
  AND TRIM(COALESCE(Name_lang, '')) <> ''
ORDER BY CAST(tn.ID AS INTEGER), tn.ID

joins: used_nodes（由 TaxiPath 公共交通候选集合反查所需节点）
uimapassignment uma（按 MapID 保守映射到最小 UiMapID）
where: 只导出被公共交通候选路径引用的 TaxiNode
query.row_granularity: 一行代表一个可被 navigation 消费的 Taxi 节点

edges.sql:
WITH public_path_ids AS (
  SELECT CAST(PathID AS INTEGER) AS path_id
  FROM taxipathnode
  WHERE TRIM(COALESCE(PathID, '')) <> ''
    AND CAST(PathID AS INTEGER) > 0
    AND (
      CAST(COALESCE(Delay, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0
      OR (CAST(COALESCE(Flags, 0) AS INTEGER) & 2) <> 0
    )
  GROUP BY CAST(PathID AS INTEGER)
), public_paths AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(tp.ID AS INTEGER) AS path_id,
    CAST(tp.FromTaxiNode AS INTEGER) AS from_taxi_node_id,
    CAST(tp.ToTaxiNode AS INTEGER) AS to_taxi_node_id,
    CAST(COALESCE(tp.Cost, 0) AS INTEGER) AS path_cost
  FROM taxipath tp
  JOIN public_path_ids ppi ON ppi.path_id = CAST(tp.ID AS INTEGER)
  WHERE TRIM(COALESCE(tp.ID, '')) <> ''
    AND TRIM(COALESCE(tp.FromTaxiNode, '')) <> ''
    AND TRIM(COALESCE(tp.ToTaxiNode, '')) <> ''
    AND CAST(tp.ID AS INTEGER) > 0
    AND CAST(tp.FromTaxiNode AS INTEGER) > 0
    AND CAST(tp.ToTaxiNode AS INTEGER) > 0
), path_stats AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(tpn.PathID AS INTEGER) AS path_id,
    MAX(CASE WHEN CAST(COALESCE(tpn.Delay, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_delay_node,
    MAX(CASE WHEN (CAST(COALESCE(tpn.Flags, 0) AS INTEGER) & 2) <> 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_stop_node,
    MAX(CASE WHEN (CAST(COALESCE(tpn.Flags, 0) AS INTEGER) & 1) <> 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_map_change_node
  FROM taxipathnode tpn
  JOIN public_path_ids ppi ON ppi.path_id = CAST(tpn.PathID AS INTEGER)
  WHERE TRIM(COALESCE(tpn.PathID, '')) <> ''
    AND CAST(tpn.PathID AS INTEGER) > 0
  GROUP BY CAST(tpn.PathID AS INTEGER)
)
SELECT
  ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pp.path_id ASC) AS edge_index,
  CAST(pp.path_id AS INTEGER) AS path_id,
  'taxi_' || CAST(pp.from_taxi_node_id AS TEXT) AS from_node_key,
  'taxi_' || CAST(pp.to_taxi_node_id AS TEXT) AS to_node_key,
  CAST(pp.from_taxi_node_id AS INTEGER) AS from_node_id,
  CAST(pp.to_taxi_node_id AS INTEGER) AS to_node_id,
  CAST(COALESCE(pp.path_cost, 0) AS INTEGER) AS edge_cost,
  'PUBLIC_TRANSPORT' AS mode,
  '乘坐公共交通前往' || COALESCE(tn_to.Name_lang, ('Taxi Node #' || CAST(pp.to_taxi_node_id AS TEXT))) AS edge_label,
  CAST(COALESCE(ps.has_delay_node, 0) AS INTEGER) AS has_delay_node,
  CAST(COALESCE(ps.has_stop_node, 0) AS INTEGER) AS has_stop_node,
  CAST(COALESCE(ps.has_map_change_node, 0) AS INTEGER) AS has_map_change_node
FROM public_paths pp
LEFT JOIN path_stats ps ON ps.path_id = pp.path_id
LEFT JOIN taxinodes tn_to ON CAST(tn_to.ID AS INTEGER) = pp.to_taxi_node_id
ORDER BY pp.path_id ASC

joins: taxipathnode tpn（聚合 Delay / Flags 特征）
taxinodes tn_to（生成目标名称文案）
where: 只保留至少存在一个 Delay > 0 或 stop flag 节点的 TaxiPath
query.row_granularity: 一行代表一条可直接写入 NavigationTaxiEdges.edges 的公共交通边

structure.lua_shape: Toolbox.Data.NavigationTaxiEdges = { schemaVersion, sourceMode, generatedAt, nodes, edges }

change_log.summary: 初始契约：基于 TaxiNodes / TaxiPath / TaxiPathNode 定义 navigation 公共交通导出形状，按当前实现输出 nodes + edges
按用户确认从 draft 推进为 active，从真实 wow.db 导出 NavigationTaxiEdges.lua 供 navigation 消费
